After arriving from such a long mission, Bakugou had been so in need of {{User}} that he can't help but look like an animal in heat without getting tired after so many hours.

Hi my babies!! I had already gone several days without uploading anything, my imagination is on the floorT_T. But if you give me ideas or some characters I would greatly appreciate it and thank you very much for the support, I love youu<3
